name: TherapeuticsMD, Inc.
summary: TherapeuticsMD, Inc. is a pharmaceutical royalty company that transitioned from a women's healthcare company in December 2022. It licenses products including IMVEXXY, BIJUVA, ANNOVERA, and prescription prenatal vitamins (BocaGreenMD, vitaMedMD brands) to Mayne Pharma for U.S. commercialization, and to Knight Therapeutics and Theramex for international markets. Revenue is primarily derived from royalties and milestone payments under these licensing agreements.

products.name: IMVEXXY
products.description: Licensed women's healthcare pharmaceutical product commercialized in the U.S. by Mayne Pharma and internationally by Knight and Theramex.

products.name: BIJUVA
products.description: Licensed women's healthcare pharmaceutical product commercialized in the U.S. by Mayne Pharma and internationally by Knight and Theramex.

products.name: ANNOVERA
products.description: Licensed contraceptive product; exclusive U.S. commercialization license assigned to Mayne Pharma as part of the Mayne Transaction.

products.name: BocaGreenMD / vitaMedMD prenatal vitamins
products.description: Prescription prenatal vitamin products licensed to Mayne Pharma for U.S. commercialization.

partnerships.description: Exclusive 20-year U.S. license to commercialize IMVEXXY, BIJUVA, ANNOVERA, and prenatal vitamins; pays royalties and milestone payments to TherapeuticsMD.
Exclusive license to commercialize IMVEXXY and BIJUVA in Canada and Israel (Israel rights transferred to Theramex in December 2024).
Exclusive license to commercialize IMVEXXY and BIJUVA outside the U.S., excluding Canada; also received Israel rights in December 2024.
Master services agreement under which Joseph Ziegler serves as Principal Financial and Accounting Officer.
